name: qa
description: >- Browser-based QA verification. Launches a real browser, navigates the app, clicks buttons, fills forms, and tests user flows. Works as a standalone skill or as a phase end condition in campaigns. Requires Playwright (optional dependency, graceful skip if not installed).
author: SethGammon
summary_zh: 这是一个浏览器自动化测试工具，通过模拟真实用户操作来验证业务流程，适合Web应用的端到端测试，也可作为自动化流水线的阶段检查点。
